heading: Framework for cross-disciplinary education and training
label: 3192 Framework for cross-disciplinary education and training
text: The Director of National Intelligence shall establish an integrated framework that brings together the educational components of the intelligence community in order to promote a more effective and productive intelligence community through cross-disciplinary education and joint training.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 441g–1 of this title
